en.name: SVDS "Arbiter"
en.description: The Arbiter is Tony's private-armory answer to a question nobody sane asked: what if an SVDS stopped acting like a disciplined marksman's rifle and started handing down sentences in bursts? The rifle has been reinforced, tuned, and modified to survive full-auto fire better than it has any right to. It is heavy-handed, expensive to feed, and punishing if you treat it casually. Tony does not sell it as a precision tool. He sells it as judgment with a folding stock.
